title: Linting for Correctness, Safety, and Maintainability · Failure Case: Lint Upgrades
summary: Configure a high-signal linter beyond default style warnings. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates lint upgrades increment in a risk-based lint policy and fixtures. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Review new, removed, renamed, and changed rules during tool upgrades.
Keep failing and passing fixtures for important custom policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
